commit.message:
Migrate all 12 multi-agent skills from subagent spawning to Agent Teams

Skills previously mixed subagent terminology (Task tool, Subagent type) with
Agent Teams communication (SendMessage, broadcast), creating contradictory
instructions. Now all skills use the correct Agent Teams workflow:
TeamCreate → TaskCreate → Agent tool with team_name parameter.

- Replace "Spawn the Team" intros with explicit 3-step TeamCreate workflow
- Remove all "Subagent type: general-purpose" lines from teammate definitions
- Replace "Task tool" references with "Agent tool with team_name"
- Update A3 validator to check Name + Model only (no Subagent type)
- Update CLAUDE.md architecture table to reflect Agent Teams pattern

commit.message:
fix: Document PAT workflow scope requirement for CI workflow addition

The original task to add GitHub Actions CI workflow failed because the
GitHub Personal Access Token lacks the `workflow` scope required to
push `.github/workflows/` files. This is a platform-level permission
issue, not a code error.

The CI workflow file (.github/workflows/ci.yml) has been prepared and
is ready to push once the PAT is updated with `workflow` scope.

UI Phase 4+5: decision cards + floating pill tab bar

Phase 4 — Decision & Event Cards:

- New arcTitle style: Inter SemiBold 15px with wide tracking
- optionTitle bumped to sizeBase (15px) for touch legibility

- optionBtnPressed: warm charcoal pressed state for choice buttons
- expiryPill: slightly larger hit area (paddingV 3, paddingH 10)
- Crisis/decision titles now use decisionTitle style
- Arc card names now use arcTitle style

Phase 5 — Floating Pill Tab Bar:

- Pill shape: borderRadius 32, marginHorizontal 24, height 60
- Floats above content via marginBottom 24 (iOS) / 10 (Android)
- bgElevated fill with borderDefault border + warm shadow

feat: 新增钉钉 Stream 模式适配器

- main() 钉钉模式下跳过 iMessage 轮询，asyncio.Event 永久挂起
- .env 新增 PLATFORM / DINGTALK_CLIENT_ID / DINGTALK_CLIENT_SECRET
- 切换平台只需改 PLATFORM=dingtalk | imessage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add analysis columns to trades_log, per-candle TP/SL, timer-based DCA

trades_log.csv new columns:
- capital_before / capital_after: running equity around each trade
- duration_hours: time in trade
- bullet_value_at_open: USD per bullet at entry (shows compounding)
- price_change_pct: raw unleveraged price move entry to exit
- capital_pct_risked: total_margin / capital_before x 100

TP/SL logic:
- Moved to per-candle check using candle high/low (same as liquidation)
- Fills at exact target price instead of candle close
- Prevents overshoot in both directions

DCA logic:
- Kept on BULLET_INTERVAL_H timer (configurable, default 24h)
- Added tp_price() and sl_price() methods to Position class
- Removed BULLET_INTERVAL_H dependency from TP/SL path

commit.message:
Add GitHub Action to find issues a PR might fix (#27991)

## Summary
- Adds a Claude-powered bot that runs when PRs are opened and searches
for open issues the PR may resolve
- Uses the same pattern as the existing dedupe issues bot: a workflow
triggers Claude Code with a `/find-issues` slash command
- The command reads the PR diff, launches 5 parallel search agents with
diverse keyword strategies, filters false positives, and comments on the
PR with up to 5 related open issues

## Test plan
- [ ] Open a test PR and verify the workflow triggers
- [ ] Verify the bot comments with relevant issues and doesn't duplicate
comments on re-runs
- [ ] Verify issues already referenced in the PR body are excluded from
results

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Bot <claude-bot@bun.sh>

commit.message:
feat: CTC split fields, key achievements, and job prefs section on profile-edit

Fix 1 — CTC split controls:
- Replaced f_current_annual_ctc_with_currency single input with currency select
  (f_current_ctc_currency, 110px) + amount input (f_current_ctc_amount, flex:1)
- Added Expected CTC split (f_expected_ctc_currency + f_expected_ctc_amount) directly below
- Both use exact 41-currency list from register form (INR default)
- parseCTC() helper splits stored "INR 24,00,000" on load; save combines back

Fix 2 — Missing fields:
- Added Key Achievements textarea (f_key_achievements) to Professional Summary section
- Added Section 9 "Job Preferences" before save bar with Work Level (f_work_level)
  and Preferred Work Type (f_preferred_work_type) selects
- Pre-fill for all new fields wired in populateForm()
- saveProfile() now sends all 5 new/changed fields

Backend: added key_achievements to SCALAR_FIELDS in candidate.js PUT handler
(expected_annual_ctc_with_currency, work_level, preferred_work_type were already present)

commit.message:
docs: add ZUNA single-process pipeline design and BLE Docker research

Single-process architecture chosen over Docker Compose: ZUNA model loads
in the same Python process as BrainFlow, called via model.sample() with
no IPC overhead. BLE Docker research documented but deemed unnecessary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Phase 5 tool detail page, ratings API, forks API

- /tool/[id]: view-only page with header, preview, version chain, ratings
- Preview handles HTML (iframe), markdown, CSV/TSV table, syntax-highlighted code, images, fallback
- Copy button copies 'ForkHub tool: [title] (ID: [id])' with 1.5s fade-out tooltip
- POST /api/tools/[id]/rate: upsert rating, recalculate avg/count, blocks self-rating
- GET /api/tools/[id]/ratings: returns ratings with user name
- GET /api/tools/[id]/forks: returns child tools
- highlight.js registered per-language (127KB vs 414KB full bundle)

commit.message:
fix: hosting terraform — use native k8s resources and project-level IAM

Replace null_resource/kubectl with kubernetes_namespace and
kubernetes_network_policy to avoid gke-gcloud-auth-plugin dependency
in CI. Switch repo-level IAM to project-level to fix setIamPolicy
permission error.

chore(infra): remove .env dependency for local development

Local dev now only needs `pulumi login` — credentials are stored in
~/.pulumi/credentials.json. The .env file is only needed for CI/headless
environments.

Sections: Noise overlay, Navbar (floating pill), Hero (100dvh),
Features (3 interactive cards: Shuffler/Typewriter/Scheduler),

BookNow (enquiry form), Footer with status indicator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(test): use unique messages in S6 markdown tests

The original tests used hardcoded strings like "**bold text here**"
which accumulate in #general across runs. Playwright strict mode
rejects multiple matches. Now all tests use timestamped content.

feat: 20 logros + fix racha bug + dedicación intensiva real

Bug fix: update_streak y check_and_grant_logros corrían en paralelo
(Promise.allSettled) — logros de racha leían racha_maxima ANTES de que
update_streak la actualizara. Ahora son secuenciales.

8 nuevos logros (12 → 20): primer_simulacro, 5_simulacros, racha_14,
1000_preguntas, nota_90, 3_perfectos, bloque1_completo, bloque2_completo.
Migration 029 con CHECK constraint + RPC actualizado.

Dedicación semanal: reglas OBLIGATORIAS con mínimos estrictos.
Intenso = MÍNIMO 7 tareas, dificultad media/difícil, tests 20-30.
Full = MÍNIMO 9 tareas, dificultad difícil, tests 30, simulacros 100.

commit.message:
feat: complete G1000 beads, unified aviation-config, and repo cleanup

## G1000 Simulator — open beads completed

- avionics-sdk: add AHRS/ADC and NavRadios (VOR/ILS/ADF/DME) modules
- flight-dynamics: implement autopilot package (pid, controllers, modes,
  envelope, autotrim); add Cessna 182 and Cirrus SR22 aircraft models
- frontend: add flight-plan-api.ts REST client and approachService.ts
  with GPS/ILS/VOR/RNAV approach type and arm/capture lifecycle
- frontend hooks: usePerformanceOptimizer, useThrottledTelemetry,
  useDisplayTheme (day/night/high-contrast)
- docs/: user-manual, tutorials, api-reference, sdk-documentation,
  ui-reference-comparison
- tests/backend/, tests/frontend/, tests/integration/ with pytest and
  Vitest test suites

## Unified configuration system

- packages/aviation-config: new shared package with service registry
  (10 integrations), React ConfigPanel/ServiceCard/ApiKeyField UI
  components, Python AviationConfig class
- /api/settings endpoints (GET status + POST secrets) added to
  g1000-simulator, flight-planner, foreflight-dashboard, flightschool
- meta-app: Settings tab with full ConfigPanel and per-app settings links
- g1000-simulator frontend: SettingsPage using ConfigPanel
- SETTINGS_INTEGRATION.md integration guide

## Repository cleanup — obsolete files removed

- apps/g1000-backend/ deleted (superseded by g1000-simulator/backend)
- 10 orphaned Python stubs removed from g1000-simulator root
  (additional_aircraft, electronic_charts, helicopter_avionics_support,
  multi/multiplayer_shared_airspace, real_time_weather, sqlite_persistence,
  synthetic_vision, vr_cockpit_experience, weather_integration)
- telemetry_hub.py and telemetry_hub.ts removed (unreferenced)
- Duplicate e2e_test_flows.md at g1000-simulator root removed
- Compiled JS artifacts removed from aviation-accident-tracker frontend
  (App.js, main.js, Badge.js, test files) — TS/TSX sources are canonical
- Staged deleted docs/ files committed (ADVANCED_FEATURE_BACKLOG,
  HARDWARE_INTEGRATION_PLAN, ROADMAP_MILESTONE_PLAN)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: resolve 504s on large repos and clean bot noise from reviews output

StackStatus now queries per-branch concurrently instead of fetching all
PRs in one request, preventing GitHub API timeouts on repos with many PRs.

Reviews output is cleaned for AI consumption: diff hunks truncated to
last 20 lines, bot boilerplate stripped (details blocks, HTML comments,
orphaned tags), and noise items filtered (review-skipped notices, bot
invocation pings, tally summaries).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: created Z.set/2 type for lists of unique items

Works like Z.list/2 but always deduplicates the output. Supports a
`unique: :enforce` option that validates the input contains no
duplicates, reporting errors at the indices of duplicate items.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
